MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on April 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why the Inventory and Appraisal, and Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
